sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello, world!'), (2, 'Position test case');
SELECT id, position(content, 'test') FROM test_strings WHERE position(content, 'test') > 0;
UPDATE test_strings SET content = 'Updated string' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, position(content, 'P', 1) AS position_start FROM test_strings HAVING position_start > 0;
